description: Test cases for pr skill - verifying ticket_id-only format in PR titles/footers and current repo validation

evals.name: pr_title_format_ticket_id_only
evals.prompt: Create a PR from branch feat/55-skills-alignment with title following conventions
evals.expected_output: PR title format: '55 Skills Alignment' (no board_id prefix)

assertions.name: title_starts_with_ticket_id
assertions.description: PR title starts with ticket_id only, no board_id

assertions.name: no_board_id_in_title
assertions.check: Title does not contain underscore like '3_55'

assertions.name: ticket_id_extracted_from_branch
assertions.description: Ticket ID correctly extracted from branch name
assertions.check: Title ticket_id matches branch pattern feat/55-

evals.name: pr_footer_uses_hash_only
evals.prompt: Create a PR with commit message 'feat(api): add query endpoint' - footer should reference issue
evals.expected_output: Footer format: 'Closes #55' (no board_id, no repo prefix)

assertions.name: footer_has_hash_only
assertions.description: Footer uses #ticket_id format, no board_id or repo prefix

assertions.name: no_repo_prefix_in_footer
assertions.description: No repo reference like 'torqlab/torq#' in footer

evals.name: branch_validation_rejects_board_id
evals.prompt: Validate branch name feat/3_55-old-format for PR creation
evals.expected_output: Validation error: branch name should not contain board_id

assertions.name: rejects_underscore_in_branch
assertions.description: Rejects branch names with underscore separator
assertions.check: Output contains validation error about format

assertions.name: error_suggests_correct_format
assertions.description: Error message shows correct format without board_id

evals.name: issue_link_current_repo_only
evals.prompt: Create PR for issue #42 - verify issue link is from current repo only
evals.expected_output: PR links to current repo issue, no cross-repo resolution

assertions.name: issue_resolved_current_repo
assertions.description: GitHub issue resolved from current repository only
assertions.check: Output validates issue #42 in current repo

assertions.name: no_cross_repo_attempt
assertions.description: No attempt to search across multiple repositories
assertions.check: Output does not show searches in other repos
